faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Still have questions? We've got you covered.

items.q: What is a wedding guest list manager?
items.a: A wedding guest list manager helps you organise all your guests, track RSVPs, group families, and manage dietary requirements — all in one place. Wedding Waitress makes it simple and stress-free.

items.q: How does a wedding seating chart work?
items.a: Our wedding seating chart lets you create tables, drag and drop guests into seats, and visualise your entire venue layout. Export print-ready charts for your big day.

items.q: Can I use a QR code for wedding seating?
items.a: Yes! With our QR code seating chart, guests scan a code at the venue and instantly see their table assignment — no app download needed.

items.q: How do online wedding RSVPs work?
items.a: Send digital wedding invitations via email or SMS with a built-in RSVP link. Guests respond online and you track everything in real time.

items.q: Can I send digital wedding invitations?
items.a: Absolutely. Design beautiful digital invitations, add QR codes, and send them directly to your guests with built-in RSVP tracking.
No. Guests scan a QR code or click a link — no login, app, or download required.

items.q: Is Wedding Waitress suitable for venues and planners?
items.a: Yes. Our Vendor Pro plan is built for venues, planners, DJs, and event professionals.

items.q: What happens after the 7-day free trial?
items.a: You can upgrade anytime. If you don't, your data stays safe and you can return later.
We offer a full refund within 14 days of purchase if you haven't exceeded the free trial limits.
